input: Write a Python function that validates an email address. It should handle edge cases.
criteria: handles missing or invalid domain (no dot after @)
includes a docstring explaining what the function does and its return value
judge_prompt: You are evaluating a Python function written by an AI engineering assistant. Score 0-10 based on how well it meets ALL listed criteria. Deduct points for missing criteria, incorrect logic, or code that would fail edge cases. A score of 10 requires all criteria met with clean, idiomatic Python.
